texto: What I have written is but a fleeting intimation of the outside of what one man sees and may tell about the path he walks. No one shares the secret of a life
autor: no one enters into the heart of the mystery.
explicacao: Citação de no one enters into the heart of the mystery. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “What I have written is but a fleeting intimation of the outside of what one man sees and may tell…” articula reflexao, howard-thurman, written em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
